2127300.name: Killfest
2127300.description:
Killfest is a fast-paced arcade FPS that fuels your adrenaline rush! Shoot and slice your way through the pit by yourself or with friends! Think fast and coordinate your assault as you progress though waves of unique and challenging foes.

- Waves of unique enemies.
- Timer that measures your runs for the speed devils.
- Slicing mechanic that allows you to rip your enemies to shreds.
- A co-op mode so you can play with your friends.
2127300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
